title: nastus verticillatus
intro: Nastus verticillatus, also known as Chinese water chestnut or water caltrop, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nastus verticillatus include reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The herbal preparations of Nastus verticillatus include extracts, powders, and teas, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
